@@ -128,1 +128,1 @@ - * the current date and time are within the validity period given in the + * the current time are within the validity period given in the @@ -139,2 +139,2 @@ - * notBefore CertificateValidityDate, - * notAfter CertificateValidityDate } + * notBefore Time, + * notAfter Time } @@ -142,3 +142,3 @@ - * CertificateValidityDate ::= CHOICE { - * utcTime UTCTime, - * generalTime GeneralizedTime } + * Time ::= CHOICE { + * utcTime UTCTime, + * generalTime GeneralizedTime } @@ -337,12 +337,0 @@ - * The relevant ASN.1 definitions are: - * 
-     * validity             Validity
-     *
-     * Validity ::= SEQUENCE {
-     *     notBefore      CertificateValidityDate,
-     *     notAfter       CertificateValidityDate }
-     *
-     * CertificateValidityDate ::= CHOICE {
-     *     utcTime        UTCTime,
-     *     generalTime    GeneralizedTime }
-     *
@@ -356,1 +344,1 @@ - * Gets the {@code notBefore} date as an {@code Instant} from the validity + * Gets the {@code notBefore} time as an {@code Instant} from the validity @@ -365,0 +353,2 @@ + * If {@code getNotBefore()} returns {@code null}, this method throws a + * {@code NullPointerException} @@ -366,4 +356,2 @@ - * @throws NullPointerException when {@code getNotBefore()} returns null. - * - * @return the start date of the validity period. - * @see #checkValidity() + * @return the start time of the validity period (never {@code null}). + * @see #checkValidity() @@ -391,1 +379,1 @@ - * Gets the {@code notAfter} date as an {@code Instant} from the validity + * Gets the {@code notAfter} time as an {@code Instant} from the validity @@ -401,0 +389,2 @@ + * If {@code getNotAfter()} returns {@code null}, this method throws a + * {@code NullPointerException} @@ -402,4 +392,2 @@ - * @throws NullPointerException when {@code getNotAfter()} returns null. - * - * @return the end date of the validity period. - * @see #checkValidity() + * @return the end time of the validity period (never {@code null}). + * @see #checkValidity()
